rule_metadata.name: Android_Dogspectus
rule_metadata.author: Jacob Soo Lead Re
rule_metadata.description: This rule try to detects Dogspectus

rules.rule_text:
import "androguard"

rule Android_Dogspectus
{
	meta:
		author = "Jacob Soo Lead Re"
		date = "20-July-2016"
		description = "This rule try to detects Dogspectus"
		source = "https://www.bluecoat.com/security-blog/2016-04-25/android-exploit-delivers-dogspectus-ransomware"

	condition:
		androguard.activity( /PanickedActivity/i ) and androguard.permission ( /android.permission.RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED/i ) and androguard.permission ( /android.permission.INTERNET/i ) and androguard.permission ( /android.permission.WAKE_LOCK/i )
}
